title: [Bug]: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时不兼容
description: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时，json 类型会被强行转化成 longtext 类型。
bug_features_seed: CREATE PROCEDURE p_json_test() BEGIN DECLARE jdata JSON DEFAULT NULL;
SET jdata = JSON_OBJECT('test', (SELECT region FROM (SELECT NULL AS region) AS x));
SELECT jdata AS json_output FROM (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('test', NULL) AS jdata) AS temp;
key_bug_features: JSON type forced to longtext during import
